items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include concrete API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate the implementation of the scenario behavior related to 'Digest mode (daily summary vs realtime)'. While the expected result mentions confirming the scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there is no supporting evidence that validates this requirement. The prior steps indicate a consistent lack of evidence across various needs, leading to an inconclusive status.
